name: Merge Two Sorted Lists
description: Given the heads of two sorted linked lists, merge them into one sorted list by splicing together the nodes. Return the head of the merged list.
constraints: Both lists are sorted in non-decreasing order. The number of nodes in both lists is in [0, 50]. -100 <= Node.val <= 100.

performance.target_space: O(1) auxiliary or O(n + m) output
performance.stress_intent: exercise long sorted lists that punish repeatedly rescanning insertion positions instead of a single linear merge
